summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an independent PR inventory shard. Open non-security PRs are kept open for their own maintainer/author review paths; already-closed PRs are recorded as skipped keep-closed; Telegram bot-authored-message security-boundary work is routed to central security handling.
